programs.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programs.desc: Andrew tests a disturbing theory: is a secret, directed-energy weapon used in Venezuela the smoking gun behind unexplained attacks on U.S. government officials overseas? These invisible attacks led to the horrifying symptoms now known as Havana Syndrome.

programs.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programs.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programs.title: Hustlers Gamblers Crooks
programs.desc: A crafty card counter robs casinos using a pair of computerized shoes; a veteran card cheat must out-cheat another cheater; a brazen bookie attempts to outrun the law.

programs.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programs.desc: Just inches from bedrock and a potential life-changing payday at the Chute, Dustin Hurt and his crew are forced to dive in the most dangerous conditions they've ever faced.

programs.title: Airplane Repo
programs.desc: Repo men chase luxury planes for big dollars across America by relying upon their wits and skill for a high reward.

programs.title: Airplane Repo
programs.desc: Mike braves a potential suicide mission in California; Kevin is at the mercy of a mechanic and a windy night.
